title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states OptimizeAnnotated did not correctly apply order of modifiers, causing incorrect semantics
mistral_r3_notes: Wrong modifier order in OptimizeAnnotated produces circuits with incorrect semantic behavior
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states CRX/CRY/CRZ were incorrectly treated as equivalent to CX/CY/CZ up to global phase, leading to wrong commutation equivalences (e.g., CRZ doesn't commute with Swap, whereas CZ does)
mistral_r3_notes: Wrong commutation equivalences in CommutationChecker cause transpiler to produce circuits with incorrect semantic behavior (different layout-applied unitary)
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states CouplingMap should reject loopback edges (2q interaction using same qubit twice), as downstream consumers could error in strange ways
mistral_r3_notes: Missing validation allows invalid coupling maps to cause downstream errors
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states TemplateOptimization was silently dropping or miscalculating global_phase in three places
mistral_r3_notes: Global phase is dropped/miscalculated during template optimization
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR description states it fixes a bug by "allowing all calculated transformations to be applied within a ControlFlowOp" and notes that previously transformations were "erroneously skip[ped]"
mistral_r3_notes: Previously, BasisTranslator did not apply transformations within ControlFlowOp, leaving gates untranslated to target basis
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states bug arises in trivial_recurse when trying to iterate on blocks of BreakLoopOp/ContinueLoopOp which have no blocks
mistral_r3_notes: Attempting to access non-existent blocks attribute causes transpilation to fail
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states _qubit_map state was not cleared on exit, making re-use of ConsolidateBlocks invalid (e.g., calling PassManager.run multiple times on different circuit sizes)
mistral_r3_notes: Stale _qubit_map state in ConsolidateBlocks causes incorrect behavior on pass reuse
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: only the non-blank component is currently settled

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR fixes bug where VF2PostLayout can fail during layout expansion with uncoupled qubits
mistral_r3_notes: VF2PostLayout fails during layout expansion causing transpilation to abort
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR description explains bug was using enumeration index from dict.items() which has nothing to do with virtual qubits
mistral_r3_notes: Bug in TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout uses wrong indices for virtual qubits, corrupting metadata while output unitary remains correct
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states VF2 passes failed to allocate completely idle qubits into Layout objects, causing TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout to bug out
mistral_r3_notes: Incomplete Layout objects missing idle qubits corrupt metadata
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: proposed decision pending author review

title: Fix composition of final_layout
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation had final_layout composition backwards, with detailed explanation of correct composition logic
mistral_r3_notes: Incorrect composition of final_layout metadata property
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix non-determinism in CommutativeCancellation
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states HashMap/HashSet iteration causes non-deterministic node removal order, making DAGCircuit edge structure non-deterministic
mistral_r3_notes: Non-deterministic iteration order in CommutativeCancellation leads to varying circuit edge structures across runs
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix non-determinism VF2Layout with only 1q gates
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout would cause non-deterministic output for circuits with qubits that only have single-qubit operations due to unstable hash set sorting
mistral_r3_notes: Unstable sorting in VF2Layout leads to non-deterministic layout assignments
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Restore correct max_trials behaviour for VF2Layout pass
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout was not handling negative values and None correctly when ported to Rust, not preserving documented behavior
mistral_r3_notes: Incorrect max_trials handling can produce suboptimal layouts
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: only the non-blank component is currently settled

title: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states typo in DAGCircuit::pack_into causes Var output nodes to become input nodes during deepcopy or pickling
mistral_r3_notes: Serialization bug corrupts Var node direction metadata in DAGCircuit
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: open; no final decision recorded

title: Fix composing virtual permutation layouts for ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation incorrectly took inverse of final layout when composing virtual permutation layouts in ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
mistral_r3_notes: Incorrect composition logic for virtual permutation layouts corrupts metadata
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Propagate DAGCircuit.name in ApplyLayout
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states ApplyLayout didn't propagate DAGCircuit.name, which was masked by transpile but observable in generate_preset_pass_manager
mistral_r3_notes: DAGCircuit.name metadata not propagated through ApplyLayout pass
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Add 2q fractional gates to the ConsolidateBlocks transpiler pass
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR adds new 2q-fractional gates (e.g., RZZGate) to ConsolidateBlocks pass
mistral_r3_notes: Missing gate support in ConsolidateBlocks leads to suboptimal circuit consolidation
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Use average gate fidelity in the commutation checker
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states commutation checker used different metric, causing inconsistent treatment of gates; PR increases threshold making circuits have more gates
mistral_r3_notes: Changed commutation metric increases gate count in transpiled circuits
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: only the non-blank component is currently settled

title: Fix tracking of routing permutation in Sabre with disjoint backends
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR description states "In practice, Sabre aborts immediately after layout without attempting to route"
mistral_r3_notes: Sabre fails to route when backing coupling graph is disjoint, causing transpilation to abort
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Delegate BasePass.__call__ to PassManager.run
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states calling a pass directly fails while running via passmanager works; ensures same execution logic
mistral_r3_notes: Inconsistent execution logic between direct pass calls and passmanager causes failures
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: proposed decision pending author review

title: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation caused control-flow blocks to contract away from idle qubit wires, which "will no longer be always valid with the addition of Box"
mistral_r3_notes: Contraction of control-flow blocks during SabreSwap can produce incorrect circuit semantics
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix 4-pi periodicity of controlled rotations in the CommutationChecker
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states commutation checker wrongly assumes CRX/Y/Z are equivalent to identity for multiples of 2π (actually 4π)
mistral_r3_notes: Incorrect periodicity assumption in commutation checker causes wrong commutation results, producing circuits with incorrect semantic behavior
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix ElidePermutations pass in the presence of PermutationGates
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR description states "leading to incorrect output circuits and updates to the pass manager's property set"
mistral_r3_notes: ElidePermutations produced incorrect output circuits due to wrong mapping updates in presence of permutation gates
final_label_basis: Adjudication log: settled using built-from-source H1 evidence

title: VF2PostLayout added at L3 (no-op overhead; reverted)
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR adds VF2PostLayout with strict_direction mode to optimization level 3 (fixes feature request #14100)
mistral_r3_notes: Missing optimization pass at level 3 results in suboptimal circuit quality
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv

title: Fix panic on 1.0 error in VF2Layout
mistral_r3_evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout/VF2PostLayout overlooked that 0*inf is nan, reachable when error rate is 1.0 on a single-qubit node with no 1q operations
mistral_r3_notes: NaN scoring causes panic/crash in VF2Layout
final_label_basis: R1 and ChatGPT R2 agreed; copied from corpus.csv
